$comment: THIS FILE IS NOT ENFORCED BY THE CURRENT OPENCODE VERSION. It serves as documentation of intended violation patterns. The official quality gate is ./pre-build.ps1 -Build. The schema at https://opencode.ai/config.json has no 'rules', 'runOn', 'beforeTaskComplete', 'requiresNearbyPattern', or 'onViolation' properties. These were included speculatively and are ignored by opencode.
_note: All patterns below match the corresponding checks in pre-build.ps1. Keep them in sync.

rules.description: R1 (partial) — Data-Driven: literal gameplay value detected. Move to [Export] in a Resource .tres. See CLAUDE_ADDENDUM.md R1.
rules.message: Partial: this regex only catches obvious patterns. R1 requires reviewer for full coverage.

rules.description: R2 (partial) — Composition Over Inheritance: class X : Enemy|Tower detected. Create a .tres instead of subclassing. See CLAUDE_ADDENDUM.md R2.
rules.message: Partial: R2 also covers copy-paste (R3) which requires reviewer judgment.

rules.description: R4 (partial) — Zero-Code-Change Content: hardcoded array of .tres filenames. Use ResourceLoaderHelper.LoadFromDir<T>() or DirAccess. See CLAUDE_ADDENDUM.md R4.
rules.message: Partial: does not detect List.Add() patterns, procedural builds, or single-load cases.

rules.description: R6 (partial) — No Deep Node Paths: GetNode<T>() called on another object (obj.GetNode<T>), not self-access. Expose a public method on the owning node. See CLAUDE_ADDENDUM.md R6.
rules.message: Partial: detects external GetNode<> calls but not all god-object patterns. Self-access (plain GetNode<T>) is not flagged.

rules.description: R8 (partial) — Never Mutate Shared Resources: direct mutation of known Resource field (_data.X *= V). Use .Duplicate() or a new instance. See CLAUDE_ADDENDUM.md R8.
rules.message: Partial: only detects mutations on known field names. Method-based mutations and differently-named variables are not caught.

rules.description: R10 (partial) — Spawn Under Active Level Containers: GetTree().CurrentScene detected. Use BaseLevel.*Container instead. See CLAUDE_ADDENDUM.md R10.
rules.message: Partial: flags all CurrentScene usage. Reviewer must determine if it is spawn-related or legitimate non-spawning use.

rules.description: Best practice (warning, not a numbered rule): await ToSignal(...) should have a nearby IsInstanceValid(this) guard in spawner/level code.
rules.message: Heuristic: check if an IsInstanceValid(this) guard exists within 5 lines of this await.
